base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_atlas_uppercase_numbers — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. Uppercase-only pixel font — A-Z + 0-9 (36 glyphs) rendered as 8×8 tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Uppercase-only pixel font — A-Z + 0-9 (36 glyphs) rendered as 8×8 tiles; no lowercase. Used for HIGH SCORE / CREDIT / CHARACTER / NICKNAME / PUSH START BUTTON / NAMCO 1980 / MIDWAY MFG CO / GAME OVER / READY! / BONUS PUCKMAN / BONUS PAC-MAN and score digits
